title: Knifes pack from cs2
description: This is an addon to the mod Lrtactical & TACZ. It contains both regular knifes and knives with skin from CS2.
body:
**This mod add knives from Counter Strike 2**

## _**M9 Bayonet**_
![M9 Bayonet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eb9df78c3668fb36e74a02e058d298e633d82c2.jpeg)
## _**Butterfly**_
![Butterfly](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e820924aaa2d54af5550bcc1ed5738c1df039693.jpeg)
## _**Skeleton**_
![Skeleton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca868a173487399b9f8b8c47bed33f9ddcdefcd3.jpeg)
**And many other knives, which you will see in the game.**
### **How to install mod?**
First you need to have two mods: [LrTactical](https://modrinth.com/mod/lr-tactical) and [TACZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero),
Then download the mod and move it to the _**mods**_ folder.
_**DONE! Enjoy the mod:)**_
### _Also check our telegram acc_
https://t.me/ARisuTeam
